overall_status_reason: All 30 TCs pass across all 5 MUST FRs (0 skipped). FR-012 and FR-013 carry declared technical debt from Phase 4, reducing their level to partial. No placeholder FRs — pipeline is not blocked.

requirement_compliance.title: INTEGRATION_LAST_REVIEWED version gate constant and comparison logic
requirement_compliance.evidence: 5 tests passing, 0 skipped, 0 debt. semverGt verified across major/minor/patch/equal/null. evaluateIntegrationAlert returns correct alert or null in all scenarios. TC-E2E-001 verifies the alert round-trips through writeDashboard into dashboard.json at top level.

requirement_compliance.title: Feature sub-pipeline aggregation from features/ directories
requirement_compliance.evidence: 9 tests passing, 0 skipped, 0 debt. aggregatedTcTotal arithmetic verified. Malformed and missing .aitri handled gracefully. 10-feature scan completes in under 5s. TC-E2E-002 verifies the full collectAll() cycle: aggregatedTcTotal=91 (main 30 + feat-a 61), testSummary.total unchanged at 30.

requirement_compliance.title: Surface integration alert and feature pipeline data in CLI and web dashboards
requirement_compliance.evidence: 7 tests passing, 0 skipped. IntegrationAlertBanner and FeatureSummarySection verified via Vitest+jsdom. Declared debt: CLI alert line not rendered at runtime — aitri-hub monitor is a stub with no active render loop. Web surface is fully functional.

requirement_compliance.title: Detect installed Aitri CLI version at runtime
requirement_compliance.evidence: 4 tests passing, 0 skipped. detectAitriVersion callable, returns string or null, regex extraction verified. Declared debt: ENOENT and timeout failure paths tested via interface contract rather than full execFileSync mock — node:test mock.module() requires Node 22+; project targets Node 18+.

requirement_compliance.title: Extend dashboard.json schema with feature pipeline fields
requirement_compliance.evidence: 5 integration tests passing, 0 skipped, 0 debt. featurePipelines, aggregatedTcTotal, integrationAlert all round-trip correctly through writeDashboard. Backward compatibility with FR-001 through FR-009 fields confirmed. Atomic write integrity preserved.

technical_debt_inherited.substitution: CLI integration alert line not rendered at runtime — aitri-hub monitor command is currently a stub with no active render loop (monitor was removed in a prior commit). The IntegrationAlertBanner renders correctly in the web dashboard and integrationAlert is written to dashboard.json. CLI alert rendering requires re-implementing the monitor render loop, which is tracked in the backlog.

TC-013f and TC-013f2 ENOENT and timeout paths verified via regex and interface tests instead of full execFileSync mock — node:test requires mock.module() (v22+) for ESM module mocking; project targets Node 18+.
